introSection:
Big Fury was a steel roller coaster located at Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

Based on pictures and dates, this ride may be the Pinfari Coaster at Lakeside Amusement Park in Colorado.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Along with the Runaway Mine Train, Big Fury was planned to be at the park for its opening, however delays in shipments from Europe meant it arrived late in the first season. The ride was on lease, so only stayed at the park for a few years, before being replaced by the Wild Rider, a similar ride built by Schwarzkopf. It isn't known where the ride is now, or if it still exists.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * An article on Big Fury at Great Adventure History

fullText:
Big Fury was a steel roller coaster located at Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

Based on pictures and dates, this ride may be the Pinfari Coaster at Lakeside Amusement Park in Colorado.

Along with the Runaway Mine Train, Big Fury was planned to be at the park for its opening, however delays in shipments from Europe meant it arrived late in the first season. The ride was on lease, so only stayed at the park for a few years, before being replaced by the Wild Rider, a similar ride built by Schwarzkopf. It isn't known where the ride is now, or if it still exists.


 * An article on Big Fury at Great Adventure History
